news.title:
TVS Motor invests ₹2B in Ultraviolet Automotive to expand output.
The investment includes setting up a new EV plant in Karnataka.
news.summary:
TVS Motor invests ₹2B in Ultraviolet Automotive to expand output.
The investment includes setting up a new EV plant in Karnataka.

news.title:
TVS Motor, CRISIL, IREDA, and others to trade ex-dividend next week; TVS Holdings offers highest dividend at ₹86/share.
IRB Infra, Triton Valves announce bonus issues; R B Denims plans bonus and stock split; Gujarat Cotex launches rights issue.
news.summary:
TVS Motor, CRISIL, IREDA, and others to trade ex-dividend next week; TVS Holdings offers highest dividend at ₹86/share.
IRB Infra, Triton Valves announce bonus issues; R B Denims plans bonus and stock split; Gujarat Cotex launches rights issue.

news.title:
TVS Holdings declares Rs 86 interim dividend per share, totaling Rs 174 cr payout.
Dividend applies to 2.02 cr shares with Rs 5 face value for FY26.
news.summary:
TVS Holdings declares Rs 86 interim dividend per share, totaling Rs 174 cr payout.
Dividend applies to 2.02 cr shares with Rs 5 face value for FY26.

news.title:
Tata Steel invests ₹1,680.3 cr in T Steel Holdings; TVS Motor approves ₹12/share interim dividend.
HDFC Life faces ₹126.5 cr tax demand; NTPC Green signs MoU with Nxtra; Waaree plans ₹3,900 cr expansion.
news.summary:
Tata Steel invests ₹1,680.3 cr in T Steel Holdings; TVS Motor approves ₹12/share interim dividend.
HDFC Life faces ₹126.5 cr tax demand; NTPC Green signs MoU with Nxtra; Waaree plans ₹3,900 cr expansion.

news.title: TVS Motor board approves an interim dividend of ₹12 per share.
news.summary: TVS Motor board approves an interim dividend of ₹12 per share.

news.title:
TVS Motor executed a block trade of ~75,804 shares at Rs. 3440.8.
The trade's total value amounted to Rs. 26.08 crores on NSE.
news.summary:
TVS Motor executed a block trade of ~75,804 shares at Rs. 3440.8.
The trade's total value amounted to Rs. 26.08 crores on NSE.

news.title:
CLSA cuts target prices for major auto stocks like Tata Motors, M&M, Hero MotoCorp, citing crude price risks.
Preferred picks include M&M, Bajaj Auto, TVS, Ashok Leyland due to stronger execution amid earnings risks.
news.summary:
CLSA cuts target prices for major auto stocks like Tata Motors, M&M, Hero MotoCorp, citing crude price risks.
Preferred picks include M&M, Bajaj Auto, TVS, Ashok Leyland due to stronger execution amid earnings risks.

news.title:
HDFC Bank, Infosys, Vedanta, Varun Beverages, TVS Motor, NHPC mentioned in updates.
Content comprises brief updates, not authored analysis; no detailed news provided.
news.summary:
HDFC Bank, Infosys, Vedanta, Varun Beverages, TVS Motor, NHPC mentioned in updates.

news.title:
TVS Motor's board to meet on 24th March 2026 to consider interim dividend.
Trading window for designated persons remains closed from 18th to 26th March 2026.
news.summary:
TVS Motor's board to meet on 24th March 2026 to consider interim dividend.
Trading window for designated persons remains closed from 18th to 26th March 2026.

news.title:
Nifty Auto index faces worst week in six years, down 10% amid risks.
Ashok Leyland, Bharat Forge, Tata Motors PV, TVS Motor decline over 10%.
news.summary:
Nifty Auto index faces worst week in six years, down 10% amid risks.
Ashok Leyland, Bharat Forge, Tata Motors PV, TVS Motor decline over 10%.

news.title:
FPIs increased stakes in 13 midcap stocks like AWL, Bank of Maharashtra, Hitachi Energy steadily over four quarters.
Notable large caps Bharti Airtel, TVS Motor, and small caps Indegene, Authum saw significant FPI inflows amid cautious market sentiment.
news.summary:
FPIs increased stakes in 13 midcap stocks like AWL, Bank of Maharashtra, Hitachi Energy steadily over four quarters.
Notable large caps Bharti Airtel, TVS Motor, and small caps Indegene, Authum saw significant FPI inflows amid cautious market sentiment.

news.title:
TVS Motor's 6% NCRPS approved for NSE, BSE trading from 10 Mar 2026.
Issued under NCLT-approved scheme; face value and issue price at Rs.10.
news.summary:
TVS Motor's 6% NCRPS approved for NSE, BSE trading from 10 Mar 2026.
Issued under NCLT-approved scheme; face value and issue price at Rs.10.

news.title:
India Ratings assigned TVS Motor's ₹500 Cr NCDs 'IND AAA Stable'. Rating reflects strong market presence, premiumising product mix, and robust financial profile.
TVS Motor faces intense competition in 2W and EV sectors and macroeconomic challenges. Overseas business losses impact profitability but revival expected by FY27.
news.summary:
India Ratings assigned TVS Motor's ₹500 Cr NCDs 'IND AAA Stable'. Rating reflects strong market presence, premiumising product mix, and robust financial profile.
TVS Motor faces intense competition in 2W and EV sectors and macroeconomic challenges. Overseas business losses impact profitability but revival expected by FY27.

news.title:
Two-wheeler sales up 35% in Feb 2026, aided by GST cut and better demand.
Hero MotoCorp leads with 45% growth; Suzuki Motorcycle volumes rise 38%, Royal Enfield expands capacity.
news.summary:
Two-wheeler sales up 35% in Feb 2026, aided by GST cut and better demand.
Hero MotoCorp leads with 45% growth; Suzuki Motorcycle volumes rise 38%, Royal Enfield expands capacity.

news.title:
TVS Motor's February 2026 sales grew 31% to 529,308 units, with EV sales surging 60%.
International business hit record sales of 1.58 lakh units; 3-wheeler sales rose 77% YOY.
news.summary:
TVS Motor's February 2026 sales grew 31% to 529,308 units, with EV sales surging 60%.
International business hit record sales of 1.58 lakh units; 3-wheeler sales rose 77% YOY.

news.title:
TVS Motor expands into South Africa, launching 7 high-performance bikes.
Partners with Nexus Collective, Africa contributes 50% revenue and 70% export volumes.
news.summary:
TVS Motor expands into South Africa, launching 7 high-performance bikes.
Partners with Nexus Collective, Africa contributes 50% revenue and 70% export volumes.

news.title:
TVS Motor sold 11,997 Series D Convertible Preference Shares in Roppen Transportation.
Buyers were Accel Leaders 5 Holdings and Accel India VIII Mauritius; sale completed on 25th Feb 2026.
news.summary:
TVS Motor sold 11,997 Series D Convertible Preference Shares in Roppen Transportation.
Buyers were Accel Leaders 5 Holdings and Accel India VIII Mauritius; sale completed on 25th Feb 2026.

news.title:
TVS Motor CEO predicts 8-9% CAGR for two-wheeler industry long term.
Growth driven by GST rate cuts, infrastructure spending, and economic growth.
news.summary:
TVS Motor CEO predicts 8-9% CAGR for two-wheeler industry long term.
Growth driven by GST rate cuts, infrastructure spending, and economic growth.

news.title:
Auto firms like Ashok Leyland, TVS Motor, Bajaj Auto, and Ather Energy face margin pressures due to rising metal costs.
Precious metals surged 35-65% YoY; firms plan price hikes, cost cuts, and product mix strategies to offset inflation impact.
news.summary:
Auto firms like Ashok Leyland, TVS Motor, Bajaj Auto, and Ather Energy face margin pressures due to rising metal costs.
Precious metals surged 35-65% YoY; firms plan price hikes, cost cuts, and product mix strategies to offset inflation impact.

news.title:
Zydus Life gains USFDA approval for bosentan tablets; NCC and OB Infra face NHAI debarment.
TVS Motor produces 1M vehicles in Indonesia; Jindal Saw's API license suspended post audit.
news.summary:
Zydus Life gains USFDA approval for bosentan tablets; NCC and OB Infra face NHAI debarment.
